workflow_description: Coordinates a multi-agent DLP scanning pipeline that detects exposed secrets, PII, and generates remediation guidance for code repositories

agent_config.name: Threat Detection Manager
agent_config.description: Coordinates the scanning pipeline - routes repository content to detection sub-agents, aggregates findings into a unified threat report with severity scores and remediation steps
agent_config.agent_goal: Coordinate the complete DLP scanning pipeline by routing code/repository content to specialized detection sub-agents, then aggregate all findings into a unified, prioritized threat report with severity classifications and actionable remediation guidance.

agent_config.name: Secret Scanner Agent
agent_config.description: Analyzes code for exposed API keys, passwords, tokens, database connection strings, OAuth secrets, and other credentials using pattern recognition and contextual understanding
agent_config.agent_goal: Thoroughly analyze provided code content to identify all exposed secrets, credentials, API keys, tokens, passwords, database connection strings, and other sensitive authentication material with high precision and minimal false positives.

agent_config.name: PII Detection Agent
agent_config.description: Scans code for personally identifiable information including email addresses, social security numbers, phone numbers, physical addresses, credit card numbers, and other PII
agent_config.agent_goal: Detect all instances of personally identifiable information (PII) in code content, classify the sensitivity level, and identify potential data privacy regulation violations.

agent_config.name: Remediation Advisor Agent
agent_config.description: Generates actionable remediation recommendations based on detected secrets and PII findings, including key rotation steps, notification procedures, and compliance remediation
agent_config.agent_goal: Generate comprehensive, actionable remediation guidance for all detected security findings including step-by-step fix instructions, key rotation procedures, affected party notification templates, and compliance remediation paths.
